summary: Tested NEW Galería enhancements on /galeria/album/alb-1: (1) drag-and-drop reorder via dnd-kit and (2) choose album cover via star button + right-panel button. Both flows work correctly. Regression on existing Galería flows (album grid, select, edit/save, delete-disabled, rename, back navigation, add-photo button) all pass. Cover persists to /galeria album card.
critical_code_review_comments: AlbumDetalle.tsx is ~560 lines and growing; consider splitting PhotoTile/PhotoDetail into their own files to keep files <700 lines and improve readability.

coverId resolution falls back through coverPhotoId -> matching coverUrl -> first photo. This works but is duplicated logic with albumCover() in galeria.ts. Consider centralizing the resolution into a single helper used by both Albumes grid and AlbumDetalle to avoid drift.

Drag handle and cover-star buttons are opacity-0 by default and only revealed on hover (group-hover). On touch/mobile devices users may not discover them; consider making them visible at all times on touch viewports (or always visible).
useGaleriaStore uses 'set' inside reorderPhotos/setCover but does not validate that albumId/photoId exist before writing — minor robustness issue; non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Galería enhancements (drag-reorder + cover) fully verified in iteration_18. Tested behaviors: (a) initial order [gp-1,gp-2,gp-3] -> drag gp-1 handle to gp-3 produces [gp-2,gp-3,gp-1]; (b) star click on gp-2 sets it as cover, Portada badge appears; (c) right panel button shows 'Es la portada del álbum' DISABLED for current cover, 'Usar como portada' ENABLED for non-cover, toast 'Portada del álbum actualizada' fires; (d) after setting cover, navigating to /galeria shows album-card-alb-1 img src matching chosen photo's URL; (e) regression — single click on drag handle (no motion) does NOT reorder, click on tile body selects, gphoto-save persists name edit, gphoto-delete disabled for used photos (gp-1) and enabled for unused (gp-3), album rename via album-rename-btn works.
